narrative:
Jersey Township B (precinct in Licking County) has 817 registered voters, with 47.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.9 percentage points.
